frame_analyses.description: Overview of PracticeMed FLS trainer box showing 6 peg transfer pegs with rubber objects and laparoscopic instruments mounted on articulated arms
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard FLS trainer configuration with dual instrument mount system

frame_analyses.description: Trainer unit shown from side angle, displaying compact 32cm × 40cm × 30cm footprint with integrated cable management
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Mobile training platform with mounting surface visible

frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic monitor display showing endoscopic needle guidance module with numbered targets (1-10) and target time of 268 seconds noted
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Real-time video feedback system for task guidance

frame_analyses.description: Close-up of Penrose drain with marked line and pre-positioned suture, labeled 'Laparoscopic Suturing Target time 360 sec'
Display of individual trainer components including laparoscopic graspers, needle drivers, and knot pusher with detachable heads
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Modular instrument system with quick-disconnect connectors

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of magnetic base surface for needle/instrument management during procedures
Adjustable LED lighting system mounted on trainer for task visualization
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Ergonomic lighting design with flexible arm

frame_analyses.description: USB Type-C connector shown for data transfer and integration with monitoring systems
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Modern digital interface for performance recording

frame_analyses.description: Pattern cutting circle task setup with clamps holding gauze suspended over marked 4cm diameter circle
Close-up of foam appendage with pre-tied ligating loop and target mark for deployment, demonstrating Task 3 setup
Pink silicone suture pad with labyrinth-style training pathways for knot-tying practice
Close-up video feed showing laparoscopic view of foam tissue with suture delivery and biological simulation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: High-fidelity tissue simulation for advanced suturing tasks

confidence_rationale: Video is clearly an instructional equipment overview demonstrating the complete FLS trainer system and its modules. No trainee performance is present, and no task execution occurs. This is vendor/educational content showing setup, features, and capabilities across all five FLS tasks.
cannot_determine: Specific task being demonstrated — video shows overview of entire FLS system
Performance metrics — no actual task execution visible
video_type_notes: Comprehensive product/training demonstration video showing PracticeMed FLS trainer capabilities, setup, and equipment features. Includes module displays for Tasks 1 (Peg Transfer), 2 (Pattern Cut), 3 (Endoloop), 4 (Extracorporeal Suture), and 5 (Intracorporeal Suture).

demonstrated_techniques: Monitor and endoscopic visualization system operation
All five MISTELS task module configurations
teaching_content.educational_value: Demonstrates complete FLS trainer system for educators, administrators, and new users. Shows proper equipment assembly, module selection, and task-specific setup for all five MISTELS tasks.
